description: Current adapter readiness and rollout tracking for debugger platform shells. This file is the current-state companion to platform_capabilities.json, which remains the target contract.

claude-code.notes: Retains concurrent_team/team_agents/direct target contract; strict adapter depends on shared harness and host hook wiring.

code-buddy.notes: Retains concurrent_team/team_agents/direct target contract; strict adapter must move beyond write-and-stop-only hooks.

codex.notes: Wave 1 strict target using runtime_guard plus common-first control interfaces.

copilot-cli.notes: Wave 2 adapter target focused on lifecycle hooks, MCP wiring, and truthful gating.
